report.summary: Researched and built two new learn guides — Bitcoin Treasury Companies and Crypto Debit Cards 2026 — covering hot March 2026 narratives with no existing degen0x coverage; both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Topic 1 — Bitcoin Treasury Companies: 172+ public companies hold ~1M BTC (~4.8% of supply); Strategy leads with 687,410 BTC (3%+ of supply, +22.8% BTC/share YoY); Twenty One Capital launched as first pure-play DAT company (43,514 BTC); Metaplanet holds 35,102 BTC — Asia's largest corporate holder; corporate BTC growth +40% QoQ in Q3 2025; Strategy briefly traded at 16% NAV discount in early 2026 — important risk signal.

Topic 2 — Crypto Debit Cards: Confirmed content gap — no /learn/ guide existed despite /spending/best/debit-cards and /crypto-cards/* landing pages being live; Top 5 cards identified: Coinbase (4% cashback, no fees), Crypto.com (up to 8% in CRO), Bybit (up to 10% in MNT), BitPay (BTC-native, $10 issuance), Gnosis Pay (non-custodial Visa); tax implications and custodial/non-custodial distinction are the key audience education gaps.

Existing coverage cross-check: bitcoin-strategic-reserve-guide covers US government reserve — distinct topic; hyperliquid-guide, rwa-tokenization-guide-2026, genius-act-stablecoin-guide all confirmed already published; no crypto-debit-cards learn guide existed.
Market context: Total crypto market cap ~$2.39T March 2026; Bitcoin dominance 58.16%; institutional crypto AUM allocation projected >5% in 2026; perp DEX daily volume ~$22.6B.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Bitcoin Treasury Companies Guide (~2,800 words, 11 min read): Stats snapshot box (6 KPIs); ToC with 7 anchor links; Section 1 — What is a BTC treasury strategy + Bitcoin Per Share concept; Section 2 — 4 motivations (inflation hedge, shareholder signal, capital efficiency, supply tightening); Section 3 — Top 7 corporate holders comparison table; Section 4 — Strategy's 4-step capital-raising playbook; Section 5 — DAT company model (Twenty One Capital); Section 6 — 5 risk callouts (leverage, NAV premium collapse, dilution, regulatory, concentration); Section 7 — 5-method investor comparison table; 6-question FAQ; 5 internal links.

Crypto Debit Cards Guide 2026 (~2,600 words, 10 min read): Quick Picks verdict box (5 picks); ToC with 7 anchor links; Section 1 — 4-step 'how it works' flow; Section 2 — custodial vs non-custodial side-by-side comparison cards; Section 3 — 5-card comparison table (network/cashback/fees/KYC/custody/best-for); Section 4 — 5 fee types to watch (hidden costs); Section 5 — tax implications of spending crypto; Section 6 — 5-question decision guide for card selection; 6-question FAQ; 5 internal links.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Bitcoin Treasury Companies — title: 'Bitcoin Treasury Companies 2026: Who's Buying BTC?' (51 chars); meta description: ~165 chars; Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas via generateArticleSchema + generateFAQSchema + combineSchemas; Breadcrumb (BreadcrumbList schema) + BackToTop added; keywords array: 9 terms including 'bitcoin treasury companies', 'corporate bitcoin holdings', 'DAT companies'; OG + Twitter card configured with publishedTime/modifiedTime; 5 internal links.

Crypto Debit Cards 2026 — title: 'Best Crypto Debit Cards 2026: Spend Bitcoin & USDC Anywhere' (60 chars); meta description: ~165 chars; Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas; Breadcrumb + BackToTop added; keywords array: 10 terms including 'crypto debit card', 'best crypto card 2026', 'spend bitcoin'; OG + Twitter card configured; 5 internal links to /tools/tax-calculator, /tools/portfolio-tracker, /learn/stablecoin-comparison, /learn/crypto-airdrops-2026, /exchanges.
Both slugs added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts under '// Build Cycle Mar 16' comment.
TypeScript validation: 0 new errors introduced (verified with tsc --noEmit; pre-existing structured-data.examples.ts errors unchanged).

report.interactive_components_rationale: Both pages are educational learn guides — static comparison tables embedded in JSX serve the content well. Existing /tools/ links (tax-calculator, portfolio-tracker, dca-calculator) provide all calculator utility needed.
